## License: unknown
https://github.com/DwanW/STRUCT/blob/f08f3cf0295971a17f3e8ae307d618f6b9d57b30/web/components/Forms/MDEditor.tsx

```
I'll help you integrate Firebase into your SignUp component. Here's the updated code:

````jsx
// filepath: c:\Users\Waseelah\Documents\Javascript\Project\my-project\src\Pages\SignUp.jsx
import React from "react";
import { useState } from "react";
import { auth } from "../firebase"; // Make sure firebase is configured
import { createUserWithEmailAndPassword } from "firebase/auth";

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400"
                >
                  {showPassword ? (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M13.875 18.825A10.05 10.05 0 0112 19c-4.478 0-8.268-2.943-9.543-7a9.97 9.97 0 011.563-3.029m5.858.908a3 3 0 114.243 4.243M9.878 9.878l4.242 4.242M9.88 9.88l-3.29-3.29m7.532 7.532l3.29 3.29M3 3l3.59 3.59m0 0A9.953 9.953 0 0112 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.543 7a10.025 10.025 0 01-4.132 5.411m0 0L21 21"
                      />
                    </svg>
                  ) : (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}

            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"

```
I'll help you integrate Firebase into your SignUp component. Here's the updated code:

````jsx
// filepath: c:\Users\Waseelah\Documents\Javascript\Project\my-project\src\Pages\SignUp.jsx
import React from "react";
import { useState } from "react";
import { auth } from "../firebase"; // Make sure firebase is configured
import { createUserWithEmailAndPassword } from "firebase/auth";

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400"
                >
                  {showPassword ? (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M13.875 18.825A10.05 10.05 0 0112 19c-4.478 0-8.268-2.943-9.543-7a9.97 9.97 0 011.563-3.029m5.858.908a3 3 0 114.243 4.243M9.878 9.878l4.242 4.242M9.88 9.88l-3.29-3.29m7.532 7.532l3.29 3.29M3 3l3.59 3.59m0 0A9.953 9.953 0 0112 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.543 7a10.025 10.025 0 01-4.132 5.411m0 0L21 21"
                      />
                    </svg>
                  ) : (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}

                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />

                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"

                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"

## License: unknown
https://github.com/DwanW/STRUCT/blob/f08f3cf0295971a17f3e8ae307d618f6b9d57b30/web/components/Forms/MDEditor.tsx

```
I'll help you integrate Firebase into your SignUp component. Here's the updated code:

````jsx
// filepath: c:\Users\Waseelah\Documents\Javascript\Project\my-project\src\Pages\SignUp.jsx
import React from "react";
import { useState } from "react";
import { auth } from "../firebase"; // Make sure firebase is configured
import { createUserWithEmailAndPassword } from "firebase/auth";

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400"
                >
                  {showPassword ? (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M13.875 18.825A10.05 10.05 0 0112 19c-4.478 0-8.268-2.943-9.543-7a9.97 9.97 0 011.563-3.029m5.858.908a3 3 0 114.243 4.243M9.878 9.878l4.242 4.242M9.88 9.88l-3.29-3.29m7.532 7.532l3.29 3.29M3 3l3.59 3.59m0 0A9.953 9.953 0 0112 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.543 7a10.025 10.025 0 01-4.132 5.411m0 0L21 21"
                      />
                    </svg>
                  ) : (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}

              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />

                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"

            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">

                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"

https://github.com/bazelbuild/continuous-integration/blob/faa1d4e18b2eea0fe269b923220befe4b6726f20/dashboard/client/src/GithubIssueList.tsx

```
I'll help you integrate Firebase into your SignUp component. Here's the updated code:

````jsx
// filepath: c:\Users\Waseelah\Documents\Javascript\Project\my-project\src\Pages\SignUp.jsx
import React from "react";
import { useState } from "react";
import { auth } from "../firebase"; // Make sure firebase is configured
import { createUserWithEmailAndPassword } from "firebase/auth";

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400"
                >
                  {showPassword ? (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M13.875 18.825A10.05 10.05 0 0112 19c-4.478 0-8.268-2.943-9.543-7a9.97 9.97 0 011.563-3.029m5.858.908a3 3 0 114.243 4.243M9.878 9.878l4.242 4.242M9.88 9.88l-3.29-3.29m7.532 7.532l3.29 3.29M3 3l3.59 3.59m0 0A9.953 9.953 0 0112 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.543 7a10.025 10.025 0 01-4.132 5.411m0 0L21 21"
                      />
                    </svg>
                  ) : (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}

                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}

## License: unknown
https://github.com/DwanW/STRUCT/blob/f08f3cf0295971a17f3e8ae307d618f6b9d57b30/web/components/Forms/MDEditor.tsx

```
I'll help you integrate Firebase into your SignUp component. Here's the updated code:

````jsx
// filepath: c:\Users\Waseelah\Documents\Javascript\Project\my-project\src\Pages\SignUp.jsx
import React from "react";
import { useState } from "react";
import { auth } from "../firebase"; // Make sure firebase is configured
import { createUserWithEmailAndPassword } from "firebase/auth";

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400"
                >
                  {showPassword ? (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M13.875 18.825A10.05 10.05 0 0112 19c-4.478 0-8.268-2.943-9.543-7a9.97 9.97 0 011.563-3.029m5.858.908a3 3 0 114.243 4.243M9.878 9.878l4.242 4.242M9.88 9.88l-3.29-3.29m7.532 7.532l3.29 3.29M3 3l3.59 3.59m0 0A9.953 9.953 0 0112 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.543 7a10.025 10.025 0 01-4.132 5.411m0 0L21 21"
                      />
                    </svg>

                    <svg

                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"

                        strokeWidth={2}

                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"

                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}

                  value={formData.password}

                <button

## License: MIT
https://github.com/quintel/etengine/blob/1d1e36cf95ae9fae6dbb4fe999f4a71a2f50fa77/app/components/password_field_component.html.erb

```
I'll help you integrate Firebase into your SignUp component. Here's the updated code:

````jsx
// filepath: c:\Users\Waseelah\Documents\Javascript\Project\my-project\src\Pages\SignUp.jsx
import React from "react";
import { useState } from "react";
import { auth } from "../firebase"; // Make sure firebase is configured
import { createUserWithEmailAndPassword } from "firebase/auth";

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400"
                >
                  {showPassword ? (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M13.875 18.825A10.05 10.05 0 0112 19c-4.478 0-8.268-2.943-9.543-7a9.97 9.97 0 011.563-3.029m5.858.908a3 3 0 114.243 4.243M9.878 9.878l4.242 4.242M9.88 9.88l-3.29-3.29m7.532 7.532l3.29 3.29M3 3l3.59 3.59m0 0A9.953 9.953 0 0112 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.543 7a10.025 10.025 0 01-4.132 5.411m0 0L21 21"
                      />
                    </svg>
                  ) : (
                    <svg

                      fill="none"

                    >
                      <path

                      />

                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />

                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"

                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />

                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"

                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}

                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}

                />
                <button

## License: unknown
https://github.com/jackall3n/npmjs.co.uk/blob/669ce19eabcb7ef5942783e0d79c81631f6387cf/components/TermPage.tsx

```
I'll help you integrate Firebase into your SignUp component. Here's the updated code:

````jsx
// filepath: c:\Users\Waseelah\Documents\Javascript\Project\my-project\src\Pages\SignUp.jsx
import React from "react";
import { useState } from "react";
import { auth } from "../firebase"; // Make sure firebase is configured
import { createUserWithEmailAndPassword } from "firebase/auth";

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400"
                >
                  {showPassword ? (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M13.875 18.825A10.05 10.05 0 0112 19c-4.478 0-8.268-2.943-9.543-7a9.97 9.97 0 011.563-3.029m5.858.908a3 3 0 114.243 4.243M9.878 9.878l4.242 4.242M9.88 9.88l-3.29-3.29m7.532 7.532l3.29 3.29M3 3l3.59 3.59m0 0A9.953 9.953 0 0112 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.543 7a10.025 10.025 0 01-4.132 5.411m0 0L21 21"
                      />
                    </svg>
                  ) : (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"

                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"

      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">

          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}

                  {showPassword ? (

                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"

````jsx
// filepath: c:\Users\Waseelah\Documents\Javascript\Project\my-project\src\Pages\SignUp.jsx
import React from "react";
import { useState } from "react";
import { auth } from "../firebase"; // Make sure firebase is configured
import { createUserWithEmailAndPassword } from "firebase/auth";

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400"
                >
                  {showPassword ? (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M13.875 18.825A10.05 10.05 0 0112 19c-4.478 0-8.268-2.943-9.543-7a9.97 9.97 0 011.563-3.029m5.858.908a3 3 0 114.243 4.243M9.878 9.878l4.242 4.242M9.88 9.88l-3.29-3.29m7.532 7.532l3.29 3.29M3 3l3.59 3.59m0 0A9.953 9.953 0 0112 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.543 7a10.025 10.025 0 01-4.132 5.411m0 0L21 21"

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400"
                >
                  {showPassword ? (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M13.875 18.825A10.05 10.05 0 0112 19c-4.478 0-8.268-2.943-9.543-7a9.97 9.97 0 011.563-3.029m5.858.908a3 3 0 114.243 4.243M9.878 9.878l4.242 4.242M9.88 9.88l-3.29-3.29m7.532 7.532l3.29 3.29M3 3l3.59 3.59m0 0A9.953 9.953 0 0112 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.543 7a10.025 10.025 0 01-4.132 5.411m0 0L21 21"
                      />
                    </svg>
                  ) : (
                    <svg
                      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                      className="h-5 w-5"
                      fill="none"
                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                      stroke="currentColor"
                    >
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M15 12a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z"
                      />
                      <path
                        strokeLinecap="round"
                        strokeLinejoin="round"
                        strokeWidth={2}
                        d="M2.458 12C3.732 7.943 7.523 5 12 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.542 7-1.274 4
```

// filepath: c:\Users\Waseelah\Documents\Javascript\Project\my-project\src\Pages\SignUp.jsx
import React from "react";
import { useState } from "react";
import { auth } from "../firebase"; // Make sure firebase is configured
import { createUserWithEmailAndPassword } from "firebase/auth";

const SignUp = () => {
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmPassword, setShowConfirmPassword] = useState(false);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: "",
    lastName: "",
    email: "",
    password: "",
    confirmPassword: "",
  });

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);

    // Check password length
    if (formData.password.length < 6 || formData.confirmPassword.length < 6) {
      alert("Password is too short (minimum 6 characters)");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      alert("Passwords do not match");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    // Basic validation
    if (
      !formData.firstName ||
      !formData.lastName ||
      !formData.email ||
      !formData.password
    ) {
      alert("Please fill all fields");
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Create user with Firebase
      const userCredential = await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(
        auth,
        formData.email,
        formData.password
      );

      console.log("User created:", userCredential.user);
      alert("Account created successfully!");

      // Reset form
      setFormData({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        password: "",
        confirmPassword: "",
      });

      // Redirect to login or home page
      // window.location.href = "/login";
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error creating account:", error);
      alert(error.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className="w-1/2 bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-10">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-8 w-full max-w-md">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-6">
            Create an account
          </h2>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">First name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="firstName"
                  placeholder="John"
                  value={formData.firstName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col w-1/2">
                <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Last name</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="lastName"
                  placeholder="Doe"
                  value={formData.lastName}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                name="email"
                placeholder="mailhub@example.com"
                value={formData.email}
                onChange={handleChange}
                disabled={loading}
                className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col">
              <label className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Password</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <input
                  type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
                  name="password"
                  placeholder="xxxxxxxxxxx"
                  value={formData.password}
                  onChange={handleChange}
                  disabled={loading}
                  className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a2d5a]"
                />
                <button
                  type="button"
